Package in.co.rays.proj4.model

Class TimetableModel

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
public class TimetableModel extends Object
TimetableModel handles all database operations related to timetable entries. It supports adding, updating, deleting, searching, and checking timetable conflicts such as course, subject, semester, date, and time clashes. This model maps data between TimetableBean objects and the st_timetable table.
Author:
Apurva Deshmukh

    • nextPk

      public Integer nextPk() throws DatabaseException
      Returns the next primary key for the st_timetable table.
      Returns:
      next available primary key
      Throws:
      DatabaseException - if any database related error occurs

    • add

      public long add(TimetableBean bean) throws ApplicationException, DuplicateRecordException
      Adds a new timetable record.
      Parameters:
      bean - TimetableBean containing timetable details
      Returns:
      generated primary key
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if an error occurs during insert
      DuplicateRecordException - if a duplicate timetable record exists

    • update

      public void update(TimetableBean bean) throws ApplicationException, DuplicateRecordException
      Updates an existing timetable record.
      Parameters:
      bean - TimetableBean containing updated details
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if update fails
      DuplicateRecordException - if duplicate timetable exists

      ApplicationException - if delete fails

      Returns:

      ApplicationException - if retrieval fails

      list of all TimetableBean

      public List<TimetableBean> search(TimetableBean bean, int pageNo, int pageSize) throws ApplicationException
      Searches timetable records using criteria.
      Parameters:
      bean - search parameters
      pageNo - page number
      pageSize - page size
      Returns:
      List of matching TimetableBean
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if search fails

    • checkByCourseName

      public TimetableBean checkByCourseName(Long courseId, Date examDate) throws ApplicationException
      Checks timetable conflict for course and exam date.
      Parameters:
      courseId - course ID
      examDate - exam date
      Returns:
      TimetableBean if conflict exists else null
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if DB error occurs

    • checkBySubjectName

      public TimetableBean checkBySubjectName(Long courseId, Long subjectId, Date examDate) throws ApplicationException
      Checks conflict by subject, course, and date.
      Parameters:
      courseId - course ID
      subjectId - subject ID
      examDate - exam date
      Returns:
      TimetableBean if conflict exists
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if DB access error

      public TimetableBean checkBySemester(Long courseId, Long subjectId, String semester, Date examDate) throws ApplicationException
      Checks timetable conflict by semester.
      Parameters:
      courseId - course ID
      subjectId - subject ID
      semester - semester string
      examDate - exam date
      Returns:
      TimetableBean if conflict exists
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if DB error occurs

    • checkByExamTime

      public TimetableBean checkByExamTime(Long courseId, Long subjectId, String semester, Date examDate, String examTime, String description) throws ApplicationException
      Checks timetable conflict by date, time, description, course and subject.
      Parameters:
      courseId - course ID
      subjectId - subject ID
      semester - semester
      examDate - exam date
      examTime - exam time
      description - exam description
      Returns:
      TimetableBean if conflict exists
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if DB error occurs
